title: Quest 44839 2-in-1 Bagless Vacuum Cleaner/Use Upright or Handheld/Lightweight Compact Design/HEPA Filter/Attachments Included / 600W Power/Black Colour
features: 2-IN-1 VACUUM CLEANER – This stylish Vacuum Cleaner from Quest allows you to use an upright and handheld vacuum cleaner in the same device! Simply connect or release the handle to switch between modes. At 1.5kg, it is lightweight and easy for people of all ages to use in their cleaning routine.

HEPA FILTER – The HEPA filter and sponge filtration system helps to lock in small particles that other vacuums would re-circulate back into the air. This assists in preventing problems with allergies and bacteria, helping to keep you and your home in good shape!

USE ALL OVER THE HOUSE – The versatile 2-in-1 nature allows you to reach all kinds of places easily. You can also reach into cracks with the brush attachment, and use the crevice tool to clean in the most hard-to-reach areas such as underneath bulky furniture. The power cable is an extra-long 4 metres, allowing you to easily reach all areas of any given room.

EASY EMPTYING – This vacuum cleaner is bagless, preventing the need to spend money on vacuum bags. Instead, it features a quick release dust tank with a capacity of 0.8L, which is easy to empty out and allows the vacuum to be used again afterwards without any need to buy replacement bags!

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking & cleaning appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the home. From teppanyaki grills & waffle makers, to kettles, irons, & steam cleaners, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: From the manufacturer Quest 2-in-1 Upright and Handheld Vacuum Cleaner - Compact, Lightweight, Versatile, Bagless - Black Lightweight 2-in-1 handheld and upright bagless vacuum cleaner. Easy release handle to switch between handheld and upright modes. Weighs just 1.5kg so it is s easy for people of all ages and mobility levels to operate. The HEPA Filter and sponge filtration help lock in small particles that other vacuums would re-circulate back into the air. This helps prevent problems with allergies and bacteria. No mess emptying - with our easy empty 0.8L quick release dust tank, emptying out the tank is quick and painless. It can be used in upright mode for carpet and wooden floors, as a handheld vacuum on the stairs or in smaller areas, or in hard to reach areas such as ceilings and cupboards. The lightweight and bagless design make this vacuum so simple to use around the home. Extra Long 4 metre power cord for full flexibility and portability around the home. Accessories & Attachments Easy and portable to transport around, it can be used in the home, car or office with ease. The included attachments make it easy to clean high ceilings, under furniture or in other hard to reach areas. Includes HEPA Filter The HEPA Filter and sponge filtration help lock in small particles that other vacuums would re-circulate back into the air. This helps prevent problems with allergies and bacteria. Extra Long Power Cable Extra Long 4 metre power cord for full flexibility and portability around the home. Available in Red See our other listing for Red version of this model. Specifications Quick release 0.8L dust tank Includes crevice & brush nozzles Cyclonic HEPA filtration Power 600 watt 4m Power Cord Suction power 80w (max) Vacuum power 14kpa/min Airflow 20L/S Noise level 70db
